🤖 Smart Assist — AI Configuration
When your PC is ON → uses Ollama (free) via ngrok.
When your PC is OFF → falls back to Anthropic (paid, ~₹0.02/query).
Both are transparent to faculty — they just ask questions.
NGROK URL (your PC, when running)
When ngrok is running: ngrok http 5000 → copy the https URL here
ANTHROPIC API KEY (fallback when PC is off)
Get key: console.anthropic.com → API Keys → $5 credit = ~20,000 queries
🔐 Change Admin PIN
📤 Upload New Excel Timetable
Upload your time_table_2026.xlsx (or newer) to replace all timetable & allocation data at once.
🔍 Fix Missing Subject Data
Some subjects (e.g. Computer Skills, EVS, Lab subjects) are omitted from the portal's main table. This scans subId 1–300 for each affected class and finds the correct IDs.
Takes 2–5 minutes. Run once, then paste the result into app.py.
EXTRA_SUBJECT_IDS — paste into app.py line ~385

            

              
              
              

            

            

          

        


        

          
🗑 Reset All Data

          
Reset timetable and allocation to the original hardcoded defaults. Cannot be undone.

          
        


        
        

          
🔗 Quick Access

          

            
            
          

        


        
        

          
🔐 Firestore Security Rules

          

            If manager/VP sees blank dashboard, your Firestore rules are blocking reads.

            Go to Firebase Console → Firestore Database → Rules and paste the rules below, then click Publish.
          

          
service cloud.firestore {
  match /databases/{database}/documents {
    match /{document=**} {
      allow read, write: if request.auth != null;
    }
  }
}

          

            
            
              🌐 Open Firebase Console →
            
            opens in new tab
          

        


        
        

          
🔥 Realtime Database Rules

          

            If manager/VP still sees blank dashboard after Firestore rules are set, RTDB rules are also blocking reads.

            Go to Firebase Console → Realtime Database → Rules and paste the rules below, then click Publish.
          

          
{
  "rules": {
    "davan_pub": {
      ".read": true,
      ".write": "auth != null"
    },
    ".read": "auth != null",
    ".write": "auth != null"
  }
}

          

            
            
              🌐 Open Firebase Console →
            
            opens in new tab

          Holidays marked here are used by the app to calculate expected working days and flag attendance accurately.
        


        
        

          
🔔 Tomorrow's Event Notification

          

            Auto-sends push notification + toast to all subscribed faculty if any academic event is scheduled for tomorrow. Fires once daily at the set time. If nothing is scheduled tomorrow — no notification is sent.
          

          

            
            
            
            
          

          

        


      

    


    
    

      
🔔 Faculty Class Alerts

      
Push notifications to faculty devices before their classes.


      


        
        

          ⚠ Cloudflare Worker URL not set. Push notifications won't be delivered until you configure it below.
        


        
        

          
Global Settings

          

            
            
            

              Day-before alert at:
              
            

            

              Minutes before class:

Workers are free up to 100k requests/day.

🔄 Sync Cloudinary → Firebase

        

          Photos uploaded to Cloudinary but not yet in Firebase? Enter API Key & Secret once to pull all real URLs and save them to Firestore + RTDB.

          Credentials are never stored — used only for this request.
